session_summary:
Lane INT-001: Fixed broken desktop typecheck by creating two missing files that were extracted from ipc.ts during Phase 2 but never committed.

Created `packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts` — contains `registerGithubIpcHandlers()` with the full GitHub OAuth PKCE flow (crypto, safeStorage, net, shell) including handlers for oauth-start, oauth-callback, get-token, set-token, clear-token, and api-proxy.

Created `packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-validation.ts` — contains 4 validation functions: `isValidPluginConfigEntry`, `validateAndFilterPluginConfigs`, `validateAndFilterAgents`, `validateAndFilterMcpServers`. All originally inlined in the HEAD version of ipc.ts.

Updated `packages/desktop/tests/ipc-plugin-config.test.ts` — added test suites for `validateAndFilterAgents` (6 tests) and `validateAndFilterMcpServers` (6 tests) with same robust patterns as the plugin config tests.

Verification: typecheck (tsgo -b) passes, all 20+ tests pass.
next_steps: The desktop typecheck is now fixed. The two missing files close the import gap in the modified ipc.ts. No further work needed in this lane — the OAuth flow and validation logic are exactly as they were in the HEAD version, just properly extracted into their own modules.
